description: TouchDesigner version manifest with Python version mapping and release metadata

versions.label: TouchDesigner 099
versions.notes: Legacy non-commercial and commercial release. Python 3.5 introduced. First modern Python integration.

versions.label: TouchDesigner 2019
versions.notes: Python upgraded to 3.7. Added asyncio support, dataclasses, f-strings. NDI support improved.

versions.label: TouchDesigner 2020
versions.notes: Python 3.7.7. Instanced geometry improvements. Vulkan renderer preview. CUDA integration expanded.

versions.label: TouchDesigner 2021
versions.notes: Python upgraded to 3.9. Added GLSL advanced pipeline, improved SOP/POP systems. Bullet physics updates.

versions.label: TouchDesigner 2022
versions.notes: Python 3.9.9. Point Operators (POP) system introduced. USD integration. Web Render TOP improvements.

versions.label: TouchDesigner 2023
versions.notes: Python upgraded to 3.11. Significant performance improvements. NVIDIA AI tools (background removal, upscaler, denoise). Engine COMP improvements.

versions.label: TouchDesigner 2024
versions.notes: Python 3.11.7. Current stable release. RenderStream improvements, Widget COMP enhancements, enhanced POP system, improved USD pipeline.
